audit.note: each press composes its toast on the frontend (control_global MESSAGE_TOAST.show with the template `{0} Pressed`, {0} filled by $event.oSource.sId) - roundtrip-free, 1:1 with the sample's MessageToast.show(evt.getSource().getId() + " Pressed")

checked.note: manually verified in a running system - each press toasts the pressed button's client-side control id, read via the event arg $event.oSource.sId, exactly like the original.

deviations.what: the toast was switched from a message_toast_display round-trip to a roundtrip-free client-composed toast on 2026-07-22 (control_global MESSAGE_TOAST.show, template `{0} Pressed` filled by $event.oSource.sId; the app is now init-only) - re-verify each button still toasts "<id> Pressed".
